creator: luciano@vespaperitivo.it
text:
Return Receipt requests, if authorized send  a message with an empty Date:
header. At leaest on FreeBSD 10.3p21 running claws-mail-3.15.1.

This is whai I see from my webmail, if I send a Return Receipt enabled
mail to myself:

Received: from mordeus (unknown [192.168.45.6])
    by hermes.mcs.it (Postfix) with ESMTP id 2F9321B770E
    for <l.mannucci@guzzistianonimi.it>; Fri, 13 Oct 2017 12:33:12 +0200 (CEST)
Date: (null)
From: Luciano Mannucci <luciano@vespaperitivo.it>
To: luciano mannucci
    <l.mannucci@guzzistianonimi.it>
Subject: Disposition notification: Pippo!
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: multipart/report; report-type=disposition-notification;
    boundary="DN_/GW6/z7OsbJGehGVCnXLuy_5"
Message-Id: <3yD3vs3dNCzRRqT@baobab.bilink.it>
